name: PptxGenJS
when_to_use: 需要在浏览器按幻灯片坐标生成公司可继续编辑的 .pptx Blob 时用它而非手写 PowerPoint OOXML，因为原生在母版关系、媒体引用、EMU 坐标与 ZIP 打包上失败；非做在线播放界面、协作编辑器或自动审美排版器。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到能被 PowerPoint 稳定打开并继续编辑的 slide XML、rels、theme 与媒体包，也无法可靠换算版面单位；PptxGenJS 把交付收敛为 slide.addText/addShape/addImage 和一次 Blob 输出。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to generate a company-editable .pptx Blob in the browser from slide coordinates instead of hand-writing PowerPoint OOXML. Native implementations fail on master relationships, media references, EMU coordinates, and ZIP packaging. It is not an online playback UI, collaborative editor, or automatic aesthetic layout engine.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot reliably produce slide XML, rels, themes, and media packages that PowerPoint opens and keeps editable, nor can it consistently convert layout units. PptxGenJS reduces delivery to slide.addText/addShape/addImage and one Blob output.

data_in.note: presentation is trimmed geometry that boot maps to a native PptxGenJS instance. x/y/w/h are in inches, and colors are six-digit RGB without #.

slides.background?: {color:six-digit RGB string} - default theme background, usually white

elements.options: {x:number,y:number,w:number,h:number,fill?:{color?:string,transparency?:number},line?:{color?:string,width?:number}} - x/y/w/h are all inches and line h may be 0; fill defaults to transparent and line to the theme line

elements.source: {path:string} | {data:string} - exactly one; data is a data URI/base64 image
elements.options: {x:number,y:number,w:number,h:number} - all four are required geometry in inches

schema.filename?: string ending in .pptx - default presentation.pptx; used only for consumer-side naming

spec.note: Headless generation does not render directly. If the consumer also creates a 16:9 slide preview, give its container an explicit default height of 405px and do not use vh or percentage heights. The PPTX dimensions themselves come from presentation.layout and inch-based geometry.

data_in.note: presentation 是 boot 映射到 PptxGenJS 原生实例的裁剪几何；x/y/w/h 单位为英寸，颜色均为不带 # 的六位 RGB。

slides.background?: {color:六位 RGB string} —— 默认主题背景（通常白色）

options.color?: 六位 RGB string —— 默认 000000

elements.options: {x:number,y:number,w:number,h:number,fill?:{color?:string,transparency?:number},line?:{color?:string,width?:number}} —— x/y/w/h 均为英寸且 line 的 h 可为 0；fill 默认透明，line 默认主题线条

elements.source: {path:string} | {data:string} —— 二选一；data 为 data URI/base64 图像
elements.options: {x:number,y:number,w:number,h:number} —— 四项均为必填英寸几何

schema.filename?: string，以 .pptx 结尾 —— 默认 presentation.pptx；只供消费端命名

spec.note: headless 生成不直接渲染；若消费端另做 16:9 幻灯片预览，默认给容器显式 405px 高并禁用 vh/百分比高，PPTX 本身尺寸由 presentation.layout 与英寸几何决定。

provides._note: headless-primitive：不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers；browser write({outputType:'blob'}) 生成 PPTX Blob。
provides.outputs: application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation Blob；原生 write 还支持 arraybuffer/base64/uint8array。

peer.note: Blob 由下载按钮、文件保存器或上传器消费；若要在线演示，应另用 reveal.js 等渲染条目，本条只产可编辑 PowerPoint 文件。

boot.note: 4.0.1 的 jsDelivr ESM 为 default class，write({outputType:'blob'}) 是浏览器安全输出；图表、表格与母版 API 更深，本条不猜其裁剪签名。

example._why: slide/elements/options 多层且混用英寸、点与 RGB 字符串，minimal 钉死一张宽屏标题页的真实原生层次。

isolation.evidence: headless-primitive,不渲染。boot 走 write({outputType:'blob'}) —— 内存内(JSZip)构建 PPTX 二进制,不碰 DOM/head。唯一会追加下载 <a> 的是 writeFile(),boot 未用。无 CSS 注入、无 window/document 监听。产物为 Blob,零 DOM 足迹,shadow 内安全。
